markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the urgent homepage redesign driven by new market competition.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Shift from a person-focused to a platform-focused brand identity to counter new AI competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [**Urgent Timeline:** A homepage draft is due Friday for a full build next week, requiring rapid iteration.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Design Direction:** Use the existing design system but adapt the layout for more whitespace and a "flatter" aesthetic, inspired by Lagoore and Harvey.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [**Referral:** Renato referred client `smith.di` for branding work, advising them to use a smaller studio for higher quality.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Pivot: Platform-First Positioning

  - [**Problem:** Intense competition from new AI startups requires a brand repositioning.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift the homepage focus from a person to the platform itself.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [**Inspiration:**](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**Lagoore:** For a clean, whitespace-heavy aesthetic.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**Harvey:** For its hybrid model (platform + services) and feature-focused homepage, which mirrors growthx's own structure.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**Goal:** Create a "mysterious" homepage that drives contact for more information.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)

### Homepage Redesign Plan

  - [**Scope:** Focus exclusively on redesigning the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [**Visuals:**](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [**Adapt, don't rebuild:** Use the current design system but adjust the layout.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [**Aesthetic changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
          - [Increase whitespace and reduce information density.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
          - [Adopt a "flatter" look (CEO feedback).](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
          - [Retain existing colors and grids; drop serifs.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [**Content & Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [**Source:** New content is being written by Marcel; Renato will provide a draft ASAP.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [**Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
          - [Opening video (likely the CEO).](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
          - [Validation block.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
          - [Platform showcase with animated mock UI.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The tight timeline (draft by Friday) prevents building a new design system.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Action:** Frank will adapt the existing "About" page layout for the homepage skeleton to accelerate the process.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

### Referral: `smith.di`

  - [**Context:** `smith.di`, an existing growthx client, contacted Frank's studio for branding work.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Source:** Renato made the referral after `smith.di` asked for recommendations for a branding partner.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Renato advised using a smaller studio over a large San Francisco firm for better quality and results.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Renato:**](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [Provide the homepage content draft from Marcel ASAP.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [Share access to inspiration materials (Lagoore, Harvey, Figma sketch).](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Frank:**](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [Begin the homepage skeleton using the "About" page layout.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [Adapt the design for more whitespace and a flatter aesthetic.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [Create a placeholder for the animated platform UI.](https://fathom.video/share/smypgsA2Rw4_zGF9x1RB1gJz3ePsNT_R?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
